channel.title: Podcasts on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Podcasts on Arrans github.io

item.title: ubuntu-flutter-community/musicpod
item.description: Music, radio, television and podcast player for Ubuntu, MacOs and maybe soon Android

item.title: arran4/podcast-cdr-manager
item.description: CLI tool to help manage podcast subscriptions for burning to CDROMs / CDR / CDRW
